title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 253.180
text:
*253.180.  Domestic animals prohibited from running at large. — No person shall allow any domestic or other animal under his control or ownership to range within any state park at any time, unless as authorized under section 253.185.
(L. 1971 H.B. 300 § 1, A.L. 2013 H.B. 28 merged with H.B. 650) 
Effective 8-28-13 (H.B. 28); 10-11-13 (H.B. 650) 
*H.B. 650 effective 10-11-13, see § 21.250.  H.B. 650 was vetoed July 12, 2013.  The veto was overridden on September 11, 2013.
